attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.NAME, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.STATUS, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.TYPE_CODE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.DEFAULT_ACCTG_DISTRIBUTION_SET, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.INACTIVE_DATE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ASSET_TAX_CODE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.LIABILITY_TAX_CODE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.GL_ACCOUNT_SOURCE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.TAX_CODE_SOURCE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.TAX_RECOVERABLE_FLAG, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ACCOUNTING_AFFECT_FLAG, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.RISK_ELIMINATION_DAYS, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL,
 (
 select RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID,ORG_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL
 minus
 select RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID,ORG_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID = STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.RECEIVABLES_TRX_ID and ACM.ORG_ID=STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.ORG_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_AR_RECEIVABLES_TRX_ALL)
